title: Fix path traversal vulnerability in AI tool handlers
description: ai/tools.go uses filepath.Join(notesDir, f) where f comes from AI tool calls. A crafted filename like ../../../etc/passwd could escape the notes directory. Need to add filepath.Clean() and verify the resolved path stays within notesDir.

title: Fix unchecked errors throughout codebase
description: At least 8+ spots silently discard errors: utils/pick.go:34 (os.ReadFile), ai/session.go:507 (os.WriteFile for memories), config/config.go:74 (os.UserHomeDir), cmd/add.go:120 (reader.ReadString). These cause silent data loss or confusing failures.

title: Extract API key retrieval into single helper function
description: os.Getenv('ANTHROPIC_API_KEY') is called in 4+ places with inconsistent validation. Some check for empty, some don't. Should extract to a single helper that validates once and returns a clear error.

title: Unify frontmatter parsing into single canonical parser
description: utils/notes.go, utils/tags.go, and utils/pick.go each parse frontmatter with slightly different logic. Risk of inconsistent behavior. Should have one canonical parser in utils used everywhere.

title: Consolidate duplicate functions across cmd/add.go and ai/tools.go
description: slugify(), generateFilename(), extractTitle(), and stripCodeFences() each have near-identical copies in both cmd/add.go and ai/tools.go. Should be extracted to a shared package to avoid drift and reduce maintenance.

title: Make SaveMemories resilient to partial API failures
description: SaveMemories() in session.go makes two API calls (extract + consolidate). If the first succeeds but the second fails, you get partial/duplicate memories with no recovery path. Need better error handling and rollback.

title: Move Printf out of mutex in usage tracking
description: ai/usage.go:77-79 prints warnings while holding the lock via color.Printf(). Could block the spinner goroutine if stderr is slow. Should accumulate warnings and print after unlock.

title: Propagate config path errors instead of swallowing
description: config.go ignores errors from os.UserHomeDir() and os.MkdirAll(). If the home dir can't be determined, everything downstream silently breaks with confusing symptoms.

title: Move regex compilation to package-level vars
description: regexp.MustCompile() is called inside slugify()/slugifyCreate() on every invocation. Should be moved to package-level vars to avoid recompilation overhead on each call.

title: Pretty print nora search with ripgrep colors
description: Enable ripgrep's built-in ANSI color output for nora search (both content and tag searches). Add color bool param to SearchNotes() to keep AI tool calls plain.

title: Consider vault model with minimal top-level nesting
description: When exploring encrypted directories (nora-rlk), also evaluate whether Nora should adopt a 'vault' model — where the top level has a small number of named directories (vaults) rather than being purely flat. This could pair naturally with encryption (e.g. a 'private' vault is encrypted, 'work' is not). Consider: how many levels of nesting (just one?), impact on existing flat-file conventions, whether vaults change note naming/pathing, how search/tags/wiki-links work across vaults, and whether this conflicts with the 'no hierarchy, tags for organization' philosophy or is a natural evolution of it.

title: Explore locked/encrypted directories
description: Investigate adding support for encrypted directories that can be locked/unlocked. Notes in these directories would be encrypted at rest and require authentication to access. Explore encryption approaches (age, GPG, libsodium), key management UX, and how this integrates with the flat-file markdown philosophy. Consider: per-directory encryption, seamless decrypt-on-read/encrypt-on-write, what happens with search/tags across encrypted boundaries, and CLI ergonomics (e.g. nora unlock, nora lock).

title: Refactor root command flag soup into cleaner pattern
description: cmd/root.go has a large flag-checking block (L40-69) that mixes shortcut flags with normal command flow. Could be cleaner as subcommands or a dispatch table.

title: Fix budget math edge case when Total is 1
description: tools.go:301-314 budget capping logic can still attempt a read with 0 remaining if budget.Total is 1. The order of operations in the cap/maxPerRead calculation is fragile.

title: Add log rotation for API debug log
description: apilog.go file grows unbounded with no rotation or size limits. Should implement basic rotation or max file size to prevent disk usage issues in long-running sessions.
